description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with a combination of indoor and outdoor living spaces. The structure includes a main living area with large windows, a visible dining and kitchen space, and a glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory on one side. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, complemented by green landscaping and potted trees on the patio and garden areas. The roof is predominantly flat, with some sections featuring transparent or glass roofing, allowing natural light to flood the interior. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway, and the rear includes a spacious outdoor terrace. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and glass roof sections, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features open-plan living spaces and a blend of indoor and outdoor environments.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, paved walkway, and a clear view into the open-plan living and dining area, with the glass sunroom visible on the right.
description_view_1: The right-side view highlights the glass-enclosed sunroom, the green lawn, and the patio area with outdoor seating and potted trees.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the outdoor terrace, garden area, and the back facade with large windows and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: The left-side view displays the symmetrical arrangement of windows, the main entrance, and the lush greenery flanking the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
